name: axtiva/flexible-graphql-php
purpose: Schema-first PHP library that generates GraphQL models, resolvers, directive args, scalar resolvers, and a lazy TypeRegistry from GraphQL SDL for webonyx/graphql-php.
primary_runtime: PHP CLI library with optional PHP built-in HTTP demo server
primary_workflows_summary: Install dependencies with Composer and run PHPUnit for builder, generator, and utility suites.
Use example/generate_code.php or narrower example/generate_*.php scripts to regenerate example artifacts from SDL.
Run php -S localhost:8080 example/start_graphql_server.php to exercise the generated example GraphQL server.

important_repository_signals: CodeGeneratorConfig currently supports only the 7.4 template set.
composer.json declares php ^7.4 | ^8.0, but CHANGELOG.md claims a 3.0.0 PHP 8.3 upgrade; treat PHP-floor assumptions carefully.
tests/Execution/QueryFieldTest.php exists, but phpunit.xml.dist only declares builder, generator, and utils suites.
